summary: Frontend-only regression testing iteration 4 for MOMO landing page. Verified Hero span removal, Swiss flag thickness, Footer copyright, Header backdrop, WhatsApp CTAs, Problems section using photos, and mobile responsiveness at 390/1920. 11/13 checks pass. Two failures: TrustBar mobile icon size and Problem card height consistency.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile trust-item icon circles are 32x32px (h-8 w-8). Spec requires at least ~40px diameter (h-10 w-10 = 2.5rem). Measured circleW=32, circleH=32 at 390x800.

Problem cards 1-6 have inconsistent heights on desktop 1920: cards 01/02=473px, 03/04=484px, 05/06=379px. Spec requires no card noticeably taller/shorter. ~100px difference between rows is noticeable. Likely due to varying copy length + min-h-[360px] on the image column only, not enforcing a common row height.

action_items: TrustBar.jsx line 35: Change 'h-8 w-8' to 'h-10 w-10' (or larger) for mobile icon circle to meet ≥40px spec.

Problems.jsx: Normalize card heights — either enforce a common min-height across all six cards or use items-stretch on the grid so row cards match. Currently uneven due to different body text lengths.
critical_code_review_comments: Header.jsx: uses bg-white/85 (translucent) instead of pure bg-white. Even without backdrop-filter this is fine perf-wise, but spec mentioned 'solid bg-white'. Backdrop-filter is 'none' — perf goal met.
PhotoVisual images use loading='lazy' and decoding='async' — good for scroll perf.
TrustBar mobile change was applied only partially — icon container size not bumped to h-10 w-10.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static landing at https://voice-offerten.preview.emergentagent.com. Passing: Hero span removed, Swiss flag 3px thick bars, Footer no 'Swiss Made', Header no backdrop-filter, all CTAs wa.me, no horizontal overflow at 1920/390, Problem cards have images with tag chips, card-07 present. Failing: TrustBar mobile icon still 32px (need 40px+), Problem card heights vary ~100px between rows.
rca of the issue: TrustBar: source code line 35 has 'h-8 w-8 md:h-16 md:w-16' but requirement is min 40px mobile → should be h-10 w-10. Problem cards: card body text lengths differ; grid uses default alignment, so items in the same row can be stretched but rows differ. Enforce uniform min-heights or restructure content to equalize.
